hero.title: Hi, I'm Sergei!
hero.paragraph: A web developer from Vladivostok with 3+ years of coding experience and a passion for creating visually stunning and intuitive websites.

description.title: Life in a Web
description.paragraph: Web Development contains two things than I really love the most - design and puzzles. Once found out about it, I couldn't stop evolving in this amazing field. Web Development for me is like spider's web - caught and seems to never let me go.
